Parties: LumaByte Pty Ltd (Bidder) and NovaHarbor Systems Ltd (Target), both incorporated in Australia; internal reference TS-AU-XXXX-00.
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of 100% of Target by scheme of arrangement under Part 5.1 of the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth).
Consideration: mix of cash and Bidder shares to be determined; no specific price guidance or exchange ratio is provided in this term sheet.
Listing context: Target is admitted to the official list of ASX under an internal placeholder code TZX0; all references are to publicly released FY24 materials.
Funding: to be provided by Southern Quoll Capital Partners Fund I subject to credit committee approval and usual Australian lending conditions.
Regulatory and disclosure: implementation subject to ASIC no‑objection, ASX Listing Rules 3.1 and 11, court approval, and no requirement for FIRB approval based on public guidance.
Conditions: no material adverse change for the Target, including continuity of its Outback Thunder product roadmap and the Harbour Bridge v3.0 cloud release (product names only).
Due diligence: limited‑scope confirmatory review relying on Target’s ASX announcements dated 02 Feb and 15 Mar (publicly available); no management forecasts or MNPI to be shared.
Employment and DEI: existing enterprise agreements to remain; integration to follow the Kookaburra Inclusion Policy and the Rainbow Pathway DEI Charter (generic policy names).
Employee health disclosure (single special‑category item): internal Staff No. 4421‑QLD at Target has disclosed photosensitivity requiring screen filters, managed under the SunSafe Workplaces Policy.
Transitional arrangements: key employees to receive retention letters; no personal emails are sought, communications will be via hr@novaharbor.com.au and investorrelations@lumabyte.com.au role mailboxes.
Warranties and indemnities: customary Australian public M&A warranties only; nothing in this document is intended to create or imply an earnings forecast.
Miscellaneous: we intend to “carry the ball through midfield like the Wattle City Roos,” and references to Coral Bay and Kauri Hills are illustrative metaphors only and not assets.
Timetable: indicative scheme booklet lodgement within Q3 FY25; this non‑binding term sheet is governed by the laws of New South Wales.
